name: ThinkSwarm
description: ThinkSwarm - A concise and universal swarm intelligence engine for predictions

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv sync; elif [ -x ../.venv310/bin/python ]; then ../.venv310/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && ../.venv310/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt; elif [ -x ../.venv/bin/python ]; then ../.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && ../.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt; else python3 -m venv ../.venv && ../.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && ../.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.backend: cd backend && if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv run python run.py; elif [ -x ../.venv310/bin/python ]; then ../.venv310/bin/python run.py; elif [ -x ../.venv/bin/python ]; then ../.venv/bin/python run.py; else python3 run.py; fi
